commit.subject: LU-17213 lite: use-after-free in ll_direct_IO_impl()
commit.message:
LU-17213 lite: use-after-free in ll_direct_IO_impl()

fix a type in ll_direct_IO_impl() - the assertion should
be moved couple lines above.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I1106d1323718451ce2502226f2537aad32a9e241
